title: sedum correptum
intro: Sedum correptum, also known as wild coral bells or coral bells, is a type of succulent plant native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Sedum correptum is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
